text: Laydown S. Half roll on entry
column4: three-quarter negative snap and quarter roll on the 45

column3: opposite three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Half roll on the downline. Exit inverted.

text: Reverse Laydown Humpty. One and a half positive snaps

text: Spin. One and a half positive turns. Opposite one and three-quarter negative snaps. Exit upright.

column3: opposite one and a half positive snaps on the upline. One and a quarter rolls on the downline.

column5: opposite three-quarter negative snap on the downline. Exit inverted.
